arabic: وَعَنْهُ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ مَرَّ عَلَيْهِ حِمَارٌ وَقَدْ وُسِمَ فِي وَجْهِهِ قَالَ: «لَعَنَ اللَّهُ الَّذِي وَسَمَهُ» . رَوَاهُ مُسْلِمٌ

english.text:
He reported the Prophet as saying when an ass which had been branded on its face passed him, “God curse the one who branded it!”

Muslim transmitted it.

chapter.english: Game and Animals Which May Be Slaughtered
